---
name: Code Review Finding
description: Report a violation of linux-rules.md
labels: [code-review]
---

## Rule violated
- **Rule number:** (e.g. Rule 5, Rule 7)
- **Rule name:** (e.g. "ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList", "No bare catch")

## Location
- **File:** (e.g. `src/Services.Linux.Native/Commands/StartServiceCommand.cs`)
- **Line:** (approximate)

## What's wrong
Describe the violation.

## How to fix
Suggested fix or approach.

## Severity
- [ ] MUST — blocks merge
- [ ] SHOULD — should be fixed before merge
- [ ] MINOR — cosmetic or style
